original: Developed by Paragon Inc., this high-tech sock has a miniaturized scanner inside its cybernetic lock. After syncing it with the user’s CODEX, it provides additional information about the nearby surroundings.\n\nProvides a Discovery Range of 3 and an Exploration Range of 2.
